title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 4.2%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Because I love Nigel Farage and want him to be prime minister. Or, because I didn’t have anything to add other than retweeting my colleagues’ reporting on the issue.

One or the other. Who can say, really?
items.content_text:
